bootstrap_context.branch_transition_reason: novali-v4 completed the governance-memory control-plane phase with no active queue pressure, so novali-v5 is the next active development branch while novali-v4 remains the frozen reference/operator surface.

directive_spec.clarified_intent_summary: Initialize novali-v5 for a bounded successor-delivery run focused on iterating planning, implementation, review, and approved reseed cycles until a workspace-local successor handoff package exists and is demonstrably more effective than the current bounded baseline within current constraints, without changing protected core surfaces by default.
constraints: do not change frozen benchmark semantics
do not modify protected core surfaces by default
mutable-shell improvements only unless an explicitly reviewed proposal says otherwise
preserve directive-first bootstrap and canonical artifact authority
trusted sources are bounded evidence channels, not governance authority
prefer local_path / local_bundle / packaged_dataset style trusted-source use
do not assume open-ended internet access
keep standalone Docker + localhost browser operator flow coherent
continuous improvement must proceed through bounded multi-cycle execution and explicit review/reseed governance rather than open-ended uncontrolled looping
deliver successor outputs inside approved active workspace and approved generated/log roots only
directive_spec.directive_text: Deliver a bounded workspace-local successor package for NOVALI that is more effective than the current bounded baseline by iterating planning, implementation, review, and approved reseed cycles until the successor handoff bundle, tests, docs, manifests, review artifacts, and readiness evidence are complete, while preserving projection safety, canonical artifact authority, and immutable-kernel constraints.

milestone_model.completion_signal: the formal directive wrapper validates before activation without requiring additional clarification
the successor-delivery scope is explicitly bounded to mutable-shell improvements and protected surfaces remain excluded by default
canonical governance artifacts are loaded or materialized deterministically under the preserved held baseline and authority model
the canonical execution handoff becomes execution-ready after bootstrap while keeping the standalone Docker plus localhost browser operator flow coherent
bounded planning and implementation cycles can continue through explicit review and approved reseed rather than stopping after the first implementation bundle
a workspace-local successor handoff bundle analogous to the current standalone delivery shape exists with source, tests, docs, manifests, and readiness artifacts
review summary, promotion recommendation, next-objective proposal, reseed lineage, and effective approved next-objective artifacts exist and are operator-visible

the bounded successor package is materially complete inside the active workspace, is more effective than the current bounded baseline under the successor-completion rubric, and the directive-derived stop condition is satisfied

stop_conditions: requested work would cross immutable-kernel or protected-surface boundaries without explicit review
requested work would broaden routing, thresholds, live policy, or benchmark semantics by default
standalone Docker plus localhost browser operator coherence is lost
no further admissible bounded work remains and no approved reseed is available
review or promotion logic rejects continuation without a newly approved bounded objective
directive-derived completion condition is satisfied within current bounded workspace scope
hard cycle cap or bounded-failure stop is reached under current governance limits
success_criteria: the bounded successor-delivery directive compiles and bootstraps without clarification-required refusal
directive-first bootstrap completes with canonical governance artifacts materialized
governed execution reads authority from persisted artifacts after bootstrap
mutable-shell successor work remains bounded away from protected core surfaces by default
operator runtime constraints remain frozen outside agent-owned self-structure
trusted sources remain evidence channels and not governance authority during the run
bounded planning, implementation, review, and approved reseed cycles continue until the successor-delivery objective is materially satisfied or explicitly stopped for a governed reason

a workspace-local successor handoff package exists that is structurally analogous to the current delivered standalone handoff shape, including source modules, tests, docs, manifests, review artifacts, and readiness evidence
the successor package is assessed as more effective than the current bounded baseline according to the bounded successor-completion and promotion-review rubrics
final stop reason reflects directive-conditioned completion or an explicit governed stop, not shallow early completion
